text:
EXPLANATION: The cited paper is real, but the title provided in the query ("Shiftx: chemical shift prediction from protein structures") is a descriptive title used by others to refer to the paper, rather than the actual published title of the article. The actual title of the paper published in the Journal of Biomolecular NMR in 2003 by the cited authors is "Rapid and accurate calculation of protein 1H, 13C and 15N chemical shifts".

LINK: https://doi.org/10.1023/A:1023812930288
FOUND_TITLE: Rapid and accurate calculation of protein 1H, 13C and 15N chemical shifts
FOUND_AUTHORS: Stephen Neal, Alex M. Nip, Haiyan Zhang, David S. Wishart
FOUND_YEAR: 2003
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
